    line width=0.8pt,
]

leaf/.style={

minimum height=1.5em,
fill=hidden-pink!20, % Change the RGB values to the desired values
text=black,
align=left,
font=\footnotesize,
inner xsep=2pt,
inner ysep=4pt,
line width=0.8pt
}
}
